title: Annona ubatubensis
taxonomy: Annona ubatubensis is a species in the family Annonaceae. This classification places it within the order Magnoliales. The genus Annona itself contains several species, many of which are known for their edible fruits. Annona ubatubensis is endemic to Brazil, and its classification suggests a close relationship with other Annona species. Further research may be necessary to fully understand the classification and relationships within this species.
